issues.description: Missing second effect: 'If this Character would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may return 1 DON!! card from your field to your DON!! deck instead.' This is a replacement/prevention effect triggered when character would be removed.
PowerBoost logic incomplete: should calculate +1000 per every 5 Events in trash, not just a flat perTrashedCard flag. Requires condition checking TrashCount with division/modulo logic.
Trigger should be 'Trigger' or similar (persistent passive effect), not 'OnPlay'. The first ability is static/continuous, not just triggered on play.
